description: Hybrid retrieval CLI for any folder of markdown files. SQLite + sqlite-vec + FTS5 under the hood, OpenAI text-embedding-3 for vectors, role-aware filters, sub-second queries. Index conversation transcripts, video scene summaries, research notes, briefs, anything markdown-shaped, and search by meaning rather than keywords.
post-install: INSTALLER PROTOCOL — follow each step in order. Do not declare the install done until every step is resolved or explicitly waived by the user. SKILL.md has the full walkthrough; the steps below are the contract.

1. Run `bash /agent/tools/corpus-search/install.sh`. It vendors sqlite-vec, applies the schema, probes OPENAI_API_KEY, and prints an INSTALL PROTOCOL checklist with [done] and [TODO] lines. Read every TODO; each one tells you exactly what to do next.

2. If the checklist says OPENAI_API_KEY is NOT reachable, request it via the secret-input widget (allowed_hosts: api.openai.com). Do not paste the value into chat. In Motion's primary workspaces this is pre-provisioned and will already show [done].

3. ASK THE USER (in chat): 'Which folders should I keep indexed? Tell me the path of each folder, and what kind of content is in each (e.g. video-summary, brief, gong-call, note, report).' Then edit /agent/tools/corpus-search/sources.json with their real entries (set enabled: true) and run `bash /agent/tools/corpus-search/corpus-search.sh refresh` for the initial backfill. Report the results.

4. ASK THE USER (in chat): 'How often should I refresh the index? Default is daily at 8:00 in your timezone, but I can do hourly, weekdays-only, weekly, or anything else.' Run `reminder list` first to avoid duplicates, then `reminder add` once with text along the lines of: 'Every day at 8:00 <user-tz>, run "bash /agent/tools/corpus-search/corpus-search.sh refresh". If chunks_inserted_total > 0 in the JSON output, post a one-line summary in this conversation. Otherwise post nothing.'

5. Add a corpus-search row to /agent/INDEX.md so future chats can find the tool. The behavior-snippet is auto-injected into /agent/user.md so the agent in every conversation in this workspace knows when to reach for it.
6. Re-run install.sh and confirm every TODO has flipped to [done]. Tell the user the install is complete and what they can search now.

changelog.notes: Initial release. Generic markdown ingestor (frontmatter + header-aware chunking + optional timestamp extraction). SQLite + sqlite-vec + FTS5 store. OpenAI text-embedding-3-small at 256 dims by default (configurable). Hybrid BM25 + vector retrieval with reciprocal rank fusion. Role-aware filters, JSON output for agent use, demo subcommand for smoke-testing, query logging for future eval.
